name: Clear
blurb: blue sky, the city crisp behind the glass — the sun rides fully visible

name: Rain
blurb: streaks run down the windows, the sun lost behind the rain

name: Storm
blurb: dark sky, lightning flickers off the walls, the sun swallowed whole

name: Snow
blurb: flakes drift past a softly glowing sky, the sun a faint glow through the flurry

name: Fog
blurb: a luminous white-out swallows the skyline, the sun a pale smear behind it

name: Overcast
blurb: flat grey daylight, the sun hidden behind the cloud

name: Windy
blurb: rain slants across the gusts — the sun still blazes through

name: Smog
blurb: a warm, sodium-lit haze, the sun a hazy smear behind it
